Video.summary: Rebecca and Matt race to find their missing dog Kota before it’s too late.
Video.title: Dog Missing! Search Begins

Video.summary: Jazzy sings in a music video about overcoming hard situations and being true to yourself.
Video.title: Survive Peer Pressure

Video.summary: Salish races against time, facing extreme challenges to find her missing dad in just 6 hours.
Video.title: My Dad Is Missing

Video.summary: The Ninja Fam drive all the way to the desert to swing on a cliff rope swing above a canyon.
Video.title: Rope Swing Off A Cliff

Video.summary: Jazzy and Shae go through the ultimate friendship challenge to test their bond.
Video.title: BFF Secrets Revealed

Video.summary: Payton and Paxton’s first day in high school is a rollercoaster of surprises all day long.
Video.title: High School Here

Video.summary: Bryton and Jade go on an extreme lie detector test.
Video.title: Lie Detecter Test on my Fiancé

Video.summary: Can Bryton overcome crazy challenges and find his fiancée blindfolded?
Video.title: Can I Find My Fiancé?

Video.summary: The Fun Squad Family surprise Mom for Mother's Day.
Video.title: Mini vs. Giant Products

Video.summary: Hide and seek in world's largest bounce house, then Ashton vs. Paxton in Legend of Zelda challenge.
Video.title: Biggest Bounce House

Video.summary: The Twins challenge the Bros for a WarioWare competition.
Video.title: Twins vs. Bros Challenge

Video.summary: Salish tackles 10 extreme summer camp challenges, facing her biggest fears!
Video.title: Salish's Extreme Summer Camp Challenges

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz needs to enlist the Shaman Wizard's help to defeat the void army.
Video.title: Elemental Masters

Video.summary: Salish's holiday routine controlled by Instagram, from Starbucks taste tests to room makeovers.
Video.title: Instagram Controls Holiday Routine

Video.summary: Gymnasts compete in a “Dress to Impress” challenge with flips and vaults.
Video.title: Gymnastics Dress to Impress in Real Life

Gymnastics Dress to Impress in Real Life
Gymnastics Dress to Impress in Real Life

Video.summary: Zadie lives through 24 decades in 24 hours starting in the 1960s with Rebecca.
Video.title: Survive 24 Decades In 24 Hours

Video.summary: Will Salish escape the abandoned school before getting busted by the principal?
Video.title: Trapped in Abandoned School

Video.summary: The Ninja rangers use their ninja skills to battle Zordon, who with Rita, schemes to defeat them.
Video.title: Ranger Raid Returns

Video.summary: Mean girls battle in a celebrity dress-to-impress challenge with everything on the line.
Video.title: Mean Girls Dress to Impress

Video.summary: Nidal has to complete 8 epic dares before Salish shocks him with a surprise dream adventure!
Video.title: Salish Best Friend Surprise

Video.summary: Salish and Ferran buy everything in one color, but if they go over budget, they lose it all!
Video.title: Buying Everything in One Color

Video.summary: Hudson turns Salish's room into a 7-11 while Jordan keeps her out of the house to try fast foods.
Video.title: Secert 7-11 Room Transformation

Video.summary: Salish transforms her home into a haunted house for her brother Hudson and Lexi Rivera.
Video.title: You Scream, You Lose

Video.summary: Salish and her brother try to bust 50 myths in 24 hours.
Video.title: Busting 50 Myths in 24 Hours

Video.summary: Salish reveals the 10 things she's going to do every day in her epic day in the life summer routine!
Video.title: New Summer Routine

Video.summary: Can Jordan uncover Salish's secret crush?
Video.title: My Daughter's Secret Crush

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz compete in a series of challenges to see who is the most talented ninja.
Video.title: Who's The Most Talented Ninja

Video.summary: Bryton takes his secret crush on an underwater date.
Video.title: Underwater Date

Video.summary: Compilation of Jazzy's funniest TikToks.
Video.title: Jazzy's Funniest TikToks

Video.summary: The Fun Squad plans their German Shepherd's dream wedding. Will they pull it off or will chaos take over?
Video.title: Our Dog Gets Married

Video.summary: Kade’s teaming up with Nayeli to take on Jazzy and Shae in a wild challenge.
Video.title: Married in Vegas

Video.summary: Bryton sends 4 couples on mystery dates with random budgets!
Video.title: $5 Date vs. $5,000 Date

Video.summary: The Ninja Fam share the full story of their adventures in Africa. Part 1.
Video.title: Africa Full Story Part 1

Video.summary: Salish and Jordan try different products but in huge and tiny versions.
Video.title: I Tried The World's Smallest iPhone

I Tried The World's Smallest iPhone
I Tried The World's Smallest iPhone

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz hide from friends when they’re green and angry, and inside the Ninja collectable room.
Video.title: Twin Smash Bash

Video.summary: Payton and Paxton team up with Sonic in a superhero battle with the evil Dr. Robotnik.
Video.title: Fast Friend

Video.summary: The Fun Squad Family open a secret Chick-Fil-A restaurant on a school bus before their Dad finds out!
Video.title: Secret School Bus Chick-Fil-A

Video.summary: Nidal and Salish get ready for an emotional first school dance by tackling 5 mystery challenges.
Video.title: First Dance

Video.summary: Nidal and Salish reveal everything in a truth or dare challenge right before Nidal moves away to Texas.
Video.title: Emotional Goodbye

Video.summary: Nidal surprises Salish by flying all the way from Texas for an emotional birthday reunion.
Video.title: Birthday Surprises
